title: CCCyrillic
body:
## CC:Tweaked Cyrillic Font (Win1251)

This resource pack replaces the default CC:Tweaked font with a **Windows-1251 compatible Cyrillic font**.

This project can help you actualy **TYPE (INPUT)** cyrillic characters, rather than just output them to the console.

## ⌨️ How to enable typing
The resource pack only changes how text _looks_. To be able to _type_ in Cyrillic, you need to install a driver script.

Run this command on your ingame computer(or turtle):
```
pastebin get SE2bgZCy /startup/cyrillic.lua
```

After downloading, **reboot the computer**.

## ⚙️ Configuration
The script runs in the background automatically. To change the keyboard layout, `edit` the first line of `/startup/cyrillic.lua`:
- `LOCALE = 'RU'` (Russian - Default)
- `LOCALE = 'UA'` (Ukrainian)
- `LOCALE = 'BY'` (Belarusian)
